title: Mahamrityunjaya Mantra
intro: Read the Mahamrityunjaya Mantra with meaning. Chant this great mantra of Lord Shiva for protection from illness, fear and untimely death.
description:
॥ Mahamrityunjaya Mantra ॥

Om Tryambakam Yajamahe
Sugandhim Pushtivardhanam
Urvarukamiva Bandhanan
Mrityor Mukshiya Mamritat ॥

The Mahamrityunjaya Mantra is dedicated to Lord Shiva and appears in the Rig Veda and Yajur Veda. It is known as the great death-conquering mantra.

faq.a1: The Mahamrityunjaya Mantra is a powerful Vedic mantra dedicated to Lord Shiva, revered as the great mantra that conquers death.
faq.q2: What are the benefits of chanting the Mahamrityunjaya Mantra?
faq.a2: Chanting it grants freedom from disease, removes fear, bestows longevity and brings mental peace. It is considered especially beneficial during serious illness.
faq.q3: When should the Mahamrityunjaya Mantra be chanted?
faq.a3: Chanting during Brahma Muhurta (early morning) is best. Mondays and Maha Shivaratri hold special significance for this mantra.
